episodes.title: How Cult Leaders Choose a Successor?!
episodes.description:
Peter Young Joined to talk about how Leadership dynamics often shift when power becomes concentrated inside a cult. Learn how aging cult leaders impact their organizations and plan for succession. 

Watch the full video - https://youtu.be/W9Bl9VQFQIM

Welcome to the MENTAL HEALNESS PODCAST! Hosted by Lee Hammock, a self-aware, diagnosed narcissist who has been in psychotherapy for over 9 years! On this podcast, we cover all things MENTAL HEALTH RELATED, from your own personal struggles with mental health, to surviving the mental health issues that someone else has that you may have been a victim of. 

I absolutely love what I do and I love helping other people as well. Having Narcissistic personality disorder myself, I know how difficult navigating the world can be when you are having issues with your own mental health. Suffering in silence is what I did for so long but now I'm trying to help other people by giving them a platform to share their stories as well! 

If you are hear for my content about narcissistic abuse, you will still find that type of content here as well! I'm not going anywhere because using my platform I've been able to help thousands of people deal with narcissists and understand how the minds of narcissistic people can work. I still do my Zoom calls and I still have my courses and support groups available as well.

episodes.title: Reporting for CBS While Trapped in a Cult: The Peter Young Story
episodes.description:
How does a successful sports broadcaster spend 20 years inside a high-control religious cult? Peter Young joins @mentalhealnesspodcast to share the harrowing reality of "Uncle Robert"—a narcissistic leader who controlled his marriage, his family, and his mind for two decades.

Before his writing career, Peter was a sports broadcaster for over 20 years, telling the stories of athletes for networks like CBS, ESPN, and OLN. While his professional life blossomed, his private life was consumed by a "boutique cult" that specialized in coercive control and isolation. Now, Peter is using his professional voice to expose the dangers of small, family-based cults and help others find the path to recovery.

Connect with Peter Young:

Book: Stop the Tall Man, Save the Tiger: My Journey In and Out of a Cult

Website: authorpeteryoung.com

YouTube: @authorpeteryoung

Instagram: @peterbyoung

Facebook: Peter Young
 #cultsurvivor  #coercivecontrol #mentalhealness #survivalstory #brainwashing
